text: The environment feels lonely and almost foreboding; the harsh angles of glass and steel, the dim artificial lighting, and the shadows lurking in every corner strip away the warmth of any human presence. The words "R+D" on the wall echo ambitions for progress and innovation, yet in this silent emptiness, they feel strangely hollow. I sense the weight of late hours spent in sterile, isolated spaces—a place built for ideas but presently fostering only my own introspective solitude. I wonder if this is the backdrop for many frustrations that end up on sites like PissedConsumer: promises of advancement unmet by the realities of impersonal modernity.
